title: The Abyss Lake
lines: You inch past the cracking ice monoliths, breathing a sigh of relief as you arrive in an absolutely massive, unlit cavern.
Stretching before you is an inky, black underground lake. Massive, unseen creatures are causing huge, rhythmic ripples in the slick water.
There is a very narrow, dangerous-looking stone ledge encircling the water's edge.

options.desc: 1. Step carefully around the ledge to the shrine
3. Toss a stone into the center of the lake
